title: [Griffin's Keen, Switchbacks]
description: The extreme west turnaround of this part of the trail provides a view of the humps and peaks of the DragonSpine Mountain range extending off to the west and north.  Pearl grey peaks light up the horizon under the star dotted black skies.

wayto.3989: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'southwest'
wayto.3991: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'west'
